name: Tinymight 2 - Basket Screen
summary: Seeking a supplemental basket screen for your Tinymight 2 vaporiser?
description: Seeking a supplemental basket screen for your Tinymight 2 vaporiser? This screen is identical to the one that comes with the vaporiser. To clean it, immerse the screen in isopropyl alcohol and then rinse it with warm water. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
